$schema-note: One entry per generated/imported asset. commercial_ok gates the Phase 8 launch audit.

assets.license: Tripo Starter (paid) — verify commercial ownership terms before shipping

generation.prompt: A low-poly stylized game monster: a small quadruped goblin-slime creature with stubby legs, big glowing eyes, spiky back, and clawed feet. Clean game-ready topology, T-pose, neutral stance, cartoon fantasy art style, vibrant colors.
generation.negative_prompt: high poly, realistic, cluttered, multiple creatures, base, pedestal, weapons, text

optimization.ktx2_note: toktx not installed on this machine; textures are WebP, not GPU-compressed KTX2. Re-run with KTX-Software installed for the Phase 6 KTX2 target.

assets.notes: Static base mesh. Raw FBX + PBR from Tripo, optimized to a game-ready GLB. Superseded as the player avatar by the rigged/animated variant below.

assets.license: Tripo Starter (paid) — verify commercial ownership terms before shipping

optimization.note: meshopt (not draco) used because the meshes are skinned/animated. simplify disabled to preserve rig weights.

assets.forward_axis_note: This asset's forward is +X (Tripo rig convention), not -Z. Player.tsx corrects with faceOffset=-PI/2 so facing + stride align with movement. Any future clip/rig for this asset shares this offset.
assets.notes: Rigged biped + baked idle/run clips. Currently stands in as the player avatar (see AnimatedCharacter.tsx). Each clip is a separate GLB sharing one rig; the run clip retargets onto the idle mesh by bone name. Tripo's clip names both come through as 'NlaTrack' and are renamed idle/run in-app. Add slash/hurt/jump + a real state machine in Phase 2.

assets.license: Tripo Starter (paid) — verify commercial ownership terms before shipping
assets.notes: Static (unrigged) low-poly imp. Instanced per archetype in MonsterModels.tsx with faceOffset=-PI/2, displayHeight 1.4. No walk animation yet (monsters glide) — rig+animate later like the goblin.

assets.license: Tripo Starter (paid) — verify commercial ownership terms before shipping
assets.notes: Static (unrigged) low-poly toad. Instanced, faceOffset=-PI/2, displayHeight 1.3.

assets.license: Tripo Starter (paid) — verify commercial ownership terms before shipping
assets.notes: Static (unrigged) low-poly stone-golem. Instanced, faceOffset=-PI/2, displayHeight 2.7.

assets.license: Commercial rights not yet recorded; verify the user's Tripo plan and generation ownership before shipping
assets.notes: MVP source files copied from C:/Users/Andrew/Downloads/world_assets. Runtime normalizes scale and pivot. Optimize geometry/textures after layout approval; both lantern variants are intentionally used.
